# Felix Seeger

Felix Seeger — Web design, development, and digital strategy. Based in Düsseldorf, Germany.

## About
Personal and professional site: portfolio, services, blog, and contact. Built with Next.js and headless WordPress.

## Links
- Home: https://felixseeger.de/
- About: https://felixseeger.de/about
- Services: https://felixseeger.de/services
- Portfolio: https://felixseeger.de/portfolio
- Blog: https://felixseeger.de/blog
- Contact: https://felixseeger.de/contact

## Summary
Freelance web designer and developer. Custom websites, high-performance frontends, and digital strategy. Get in touch for project inquiries.
